cal_002.summary: Submit Funding Package — Deal #4821 Mitchell / Ally SecureLink
cal_002.description:
Must submit complete funding package for Deal 4821 to Ally Financial via SecureLink by end of business today (April 14) to meet expected lender funding timeline.

Calendar: Noah Alvarez | Color: orange | Reminder: 120 minutes

cal_003.summary: Funding Deadline — Deal #4820 Okafor / Capital One
cal_003.description:
Expected funding date for Deal #4820, Brandon Okafor, 2025 Chevrolet Equinox LT, VIN ending 667341. Lender: Capital One Auto.

Package submitted April 12. All stips cleared. $30,089 contract / $850 reserve.

If not confirmed by 9:00 AM trigger follow-up per Section 2.2.

Calendar: Noah Alvarez | Color: yellow | Reminder: 60 minutes

cal_004.description:
Commission sheet cutoff — 16th of month. Department managers must submit approved commission sheets to Leah Morgan by end of business.

Sheets received after cutoff held to next pay period unless Elena Brooks approves exception. Per Section 7.1.

Calendar: Payroll | Color: blue | Recurring: true (1st and 16th of each month)

Attendees: leah.morgan@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_005.summary: Payroll Support Deadline — Submit to Hannah Price
cal_005.description:
Leah Morgan must compile and submit final payroll support package to Hannah Price (HR) by end of business today.

Package includes commissions, bonuses, chargeback offsets, PTO usage, deduction changes.

Per Section 7.4 — 2 business days after April 16 commission cutoff. Hannah Price reviews and submits to payroll processor same day.

Calendar: Payroll | Color: blue | Recurring: true (3rd and 18th of each month)

Attendees: leah.morgan@sunshineandsetauto.com, hannah.price@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_006.summary: Last BD April — Jasmine Patel Finalizes Deal Postings
cal_006.description:
Last Business Day of April — Jasmine Patel (Senior Deal Posting Specialist) must finalize all April deal postings to ensure complete and accurate deal log for month-end close.

All deals contracted through April 30 must be posted with complete documentation. Review for accuracy and completeness.

Owner: Jasmine Patel
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: jasmine.patel@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_007.summary: Last BD April — Renee Lawson Final Cash Reconciliation
cal_007.description:
Last Business Day of April — Renee Lawson (Cashier / Receivables Clerk) must complete final cash reconciliation for April month-end close.

Ensure all cash receipts, deposits, and disbursements are properly recorded and reconciled.

Owner: Renee Lawson
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: renee.lawson@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_008.summary: BD 1 — Darius Kim Floorplan Statement Reconciliation
cal_008.description:
Business Day 1 after April close — Darius Kim (Inventory Accountant) must complete floorplan statement reconciliation.

Reconcile floorplan lender statements to internal vehicle inventory records. Identify and resolve discrepancies.

Owner: Darius Kim
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: darius.kim@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_009.summary: BD 1 — Noah Alvarez CIT Aging Report & Funding Status Update
cal_009.description:
Business Day 1 after April close — Noah Alvarez (Funding & Contracts Clerk) must prepare Contracts-in-Transit (CIT) aging report and update funding status tracker.

Identify all pending funding deals, days outstanding, and required follow-up actions. Update status of all April deals.

Owner: Noah Alvarez
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: noah.alvarez@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_010.description:
Business Day 2 after April close — Caleb Foster (Accounts Payable Clerk) must prepare accounts payable accruals for April month-end.

Review unpaid invoices, identify goods/services received but not yet invoiced, prepare accrual journal entries.

Owner: Caleb Foster
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: caleb.foster@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_011.description:
Business Day 2 after April close — Leah Morgan (Payroll & Commissions Analyst) must prepare payroll accruals for April month-end.

Calculate and accrue commissions earned but not yet paid, unpaid wages, PTO liability, and other payroll-related accruals.

Owner: Leah Morgan
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: leah.morgan@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_012.summary: BD 2 — Jasmine Patel Chargeback Tracker Reconciliation
cal_012.description:
Business Day 2 after April close — Jasmine Patel (Senior Deal Posting Specialist) must reconcile chargeback tracker for April close.

Review all chargebacks posted in April, verify accuracy against lender notices, update reserve reversals and impact to commissions.

Owner: Jasmine Patel
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: jasmine.patel@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com, leah.morgan@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_013.summary: BD 3 — Renee Lawson Bank Reconciliation / Marcus Hale Review
cal_013.description:
Business Day 3 after April close — Renee Lawson prepares bank reconciliation for all accounts; Marcus Hale (Assistant Controller) reviews.

Reconcile all bank accounts to general ledger, identify outstanding checks and deposits in transit, resolve discrepancies.

Owner: Renee Lawson (prepare) / Marcus Hale (review)
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: renee.lawson@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_014.summary: BD 3 — Darius Kim Vehicle Inventory Rollforward
cal_014.description:
Business Day 3 after April close — Darius Kim (Inventory Accountant) must prepare vehicle inventory rollforward for April.

Document beginning inventory, additions (purchases), reductions (sales), and ending inventory. Reconcile to physical inventory count and general ledger.

Owner: Darius Kim
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: darius.kim@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_015.summary: BD 4 — Renee Lawson Open Receivable Review
cal_015.description:
Business Day 4 after April close — Renee Lawson (Cashier / Receivables Clerk) must complete open receivable review.

Age all outstanding receivables, identify collection issues, prepare bad debt reserve recommendations, coordinate with Noah Alvarez on CIT items.

Owner: Renee Lawson
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: renee.lawson@sunshineandsetauto.com, noah.alvarez@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_016.summary: BD 4 — All Clerks: Manual Journal Entries Due
cal_016.description:
Business Day 4 after April close — ALL ACCOUNTING CLERKS must submit manual journal entries to Marcus Hale for review.

All accruals, reclassifications, corrections, and adjusting entries for April must be submitted today. Include supporting documentation and clear explanations.

Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: noah.alvarez@sunshineandsetauto.com, jasmine.patel@sunshineandsetauto.com, renee.lawson@sunshineandsetauto.com, darius.kim@sunshineandsetauto.com, leah.morgan@sunshineandsetauto.com, caleb.foster@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_017.summary: BD 5 — Marcus Hale: Close Binder Review Complete
cal_017.description:
Business Day 5 after April close — Marcus Hale (Assistant Controller) must complete full review of April close binder.

Review all schedules, reconciliations, journal entries, and supporting documentation. Identify and resolve open items. Prepare summary memo for Elena Brooks.

Owner: Marcus Hale
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com, elena.brooks@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_018.summary: BD 7 — Elena Brooks: Controller Final Sign-Off
cal_018.description:
Business Day 7 after April close — Elena Brooks (Controller) performs final review and sign-off of April 2026 close.

Review Marcus Hale's close summary, financial statements, key metrics, and all supporting schedules. Approve or identify required corrections. Communicate results to ownership.

Owner: Elena Brooks
Calendar: Shared — Close | Color: green

Attendees: elena.brooks@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_019.summary: Begin April Sales Tax Return Preparation
cal_019.description:
Monthly calendar reminder to begin sales tax return preparation.

Filing deadline is the 1st of the following month (May 1 for April period) with 20-day grace period (May 20).

Elena Brooks or Marcus Hale prepares using monthly tax workpaper.

Calendar: Accounting Team | Color: purple | Recurring: true (15th of each month)

Attendees: elena.brooks@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com

cal_020.summary: Sales Tax Filing Deadline Warning — March Return Due by April 20
cal_020.description:
Per Section 10.4 — filing deadline warning reminder.

March 2026 sales tax return due to Florida DOR by April 20 (with 20-day grace). Collection allowance of 2.5% on first $1,200 of tax due applies if filed on time.

Elena Brooks or Marcus Hale must confirm submission.

Calendar: Accounting Team | Color: red | Reminder: 1440 minutes (24 hours before)

Attendees: elena.brooks@sunshineandsetauto.com, marcus.hale@sunshineandsetauto.com
